testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. All tests were pre-written in the test-writer session.

criteria.criterion: AC1: CLI flag projectSlug overrides project config
criteria.evidence: Test passes: resolveContext({ projectSlug: 'override' }, ...) correctly returns projectSlug='override' even when projectConfig has different value. Implementation line 142 prioritizes flags first.

criteria.criterion: AC2: projectSlug comes from .koda/config.json when no flag provided
criteria.evidence: Test passes: resolveContext({}, ...) with projectConfig from findProjectConfig returns projectSlug from config. Implementation correctly falls through to projectConfig?.projectSlug.

criteria.criterion: AC3: apiUrl and apiKey from named profile when .koda/config.json has profile field
criteria.evidence: Test passes: resolveContext({}, ...) with profile='staging' correctly resolves both apiUrl and apiKey from globalConfig.profiles['staging']. Implementation lines 127-128 resolve profile, lines 133 and 138 use it.

criteria.criterion: AC4: apiUrl comes from .koda/config.json when specified and no CLI flag overrides it
criteria.evidence: Test passes: projectConfig.apiUrl is correctly prioritized after CLI flags but before global config. Implementation line 132 uses nullish coalescing in correct order.

criteria.criterion: AC5: apiKey comes from global conf store when .koda/config.json has no profile field
criteria.evidence: Test passes: apiKey correctly falls through to globalConfig.apiKey when no profile exists. Implementation line 139 uses nullish coalescing properly.

criteria.criterion: AC6: Built-in defaults when no .koda/config.json and global conf store empty
criteria.evidence: Test passes: resolveContext returns apiUrl='http://localhost:3100/api' and apiKey='' when both projectConfig and globalConfig are empty. Implementation lines 118, 134, and 140 provide correct defaults.

codeReviewNotes.typeSafety: ✅ All types properly defined. ResolvedContext, Profile, ProjectConfig, ResolveContextFlags, ResolveContextDeps all correctly typed. No `any` types.
codeReviewNotes.dependencyInjection: ✅ Uses _deps pattern for testability. ResolveContextDeps allows tests to inject mock implementations of findProjectConfig and getConfig.
codeReviewNotes.priorityOrder: ✅ Correctly implements priority: CLI flags > projectConfig > profile > globalConfig > built-in defaults
codeReviewNotes.errorHandling: ✅ No errors thrown (correct for config merging). Parent function findProjectConfig handles errors gracefully.
codeReviewNotes.functionLength: ✅ resolveContext is 25 lines, well within limits
codeReviewNotes.nullishCoalescing: ✅ Correctly uses nullish coalescing (??) with proper parentheses for mixed ?? and || operators (line 134)

reasoning: All 31 tests pass, including all 6 resolveContext acceptance criteria. Implementation is clean, follows project conventions, and properly merges configuration sources in the correct priority order: CLI flags > .koda/config.json > active named profile > global conf store > built-in defaults. Code quality is good with proper types, dependency injection, and no test modifications.
